heading: Security for costs
label: 8869 Security for costs
text: The court may require any party to give security for costs at any stage of the cause and upon filing an appeal.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7669.34 U.S.C. 1148R.S. 4638.The word “filing” is substituted for the word “claiming”.
